codeReview.summary: The worker successfully verified all 6 NAV validation assertions (VAL-NAV-001 through VAL-NAV-006) for the navigation shell. The primary work was fixing the broken PortalGovernanceLayout test which had an incomplete Sidebar mock causing render crashes. The test was updated to match the current 7-group/10-item sidebar structure with correct assertions for all navigation items and group labels.

summary: PASS - The navigation shell verification is complete. All sidebar groups and items (7 groups, 10 links) are correctly configured, active state highlighting works, collapse/expand persists in localStorage, mobile drawer opens/closes correctly, and breadcrumbs display correct labels from ROUTE_LABELS. The PortalGovernanceLayout test was fixed to properly mock the Sidebar component and assert against the current navigation structure. All 226 tests pass including the updated layout test.
